title: aster crinifer
intro: Aster crinifer, also known as the White-woolly Aster or White-woolly Michaelmas Daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Aster crinifer is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules, or applied topically as a poultice or salve.
